message:
test(wave-58): derive trait coverage for PollingOrder, Race3/4, CancelBroadcastMetrics, snapshot types

9 new tests: race (PollingOrder, Race3, Race4), symbol_cancel
(CancelBroadcastMetrics, CleanupStats, CleanupResult), state
(BudgetSnapshot, CancelKindSnapshot, RegionStateSnapshot).
